← All ECHO examples

ECHO — non-finisher (DNF) carries handicap unchanged

Scoring system: ECHO    α (blend factor): 0.25 
Three boats finish, one DNFs. Per the IS guide: "Boats which did not finish or
did not start do not affect the performance index and their handicap remains
unchanged for the next race." DNF row contributes nothing to ΣH_S or
Σ(1/T_E); its newTcf equals its starting handicap.

Three finishers ≥ 3, so the rating update is not suppressed.
Ranks by net points (corrected times determine race finish order)

Race 1

Gun time: 12:00:00   α: 0.25   Finishers: 3   ΣHS: 3.070   Σ(1/TE): 0.00081982
RankNameSail # Finish timeTE1/TE Starting HCTPIadjNew H Points
1 Alpha 1 13:00:00 60m 00s 0.00027778 1.0000 60m 00s 1.0402 +0.0101 1.0101 1
2 Bravo 2 13:01:00 61m 00s 0.00027322 1.0200 62m 13s 1.0231 +0.0008 1.0208 2
3 Charlie 3 13:02:00 62m 00s 0.00026882 1.0500 65m 06s 1.0066 -0.0108 1.0392 3
— Delta 4 DNF — — 0.9800 — — — 0.9800 5

Series standings

RankNameSail #R1TotalNet
1 Alpha 1 1 1 1
2 Bravo 2 2 2 2
3 Charlie 3 3 3 3
4 Delta 4 DNF 5 5
sailscoring.ie
